# HermesWorkspace

> All-in-one school management and communication platform built for India's CBSE, ICSE, and State Board schools.

HermesWorkspace replaces scattered WhatsApp groups and disconnected tools with a single, structured institutional platform for schools.

## What it does

HermesWorkspace is a SaaS platform for educational institutions (K–12 schools) that centralizes:
- **Live HD classes** — 30 concurrent sessions, 150 students per session, 360p SFU quality
- **Institutional messaging** — role-based channels for admin, teachers, students, and parents
- **Digital notice board** — push announcements to all parents with delivery tracking
- **Meeting scheduler** — PTMs, board meetings, staff reviews with calendar sync
- **Webinars** — large-scale sessions with registration and attendance tracking
- **Member management** — bulk onboarding of students, teachers, and admins
- **School analytics** — real-time dashboard for principals and administrators

## Who it's for

- CBSE, ICSE, and State Board schools in India
- School administrators and principals
- Teachers coordinating with students and parents
- Parents staying connected with their child's school

## Company

- **Name:** HermesWorkspace Pvt. Ltd.
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** Ranchi, Jharkhand, India
- **Founders:** Apurav Agarwal (CEO), Lakshya Kumar (Director & CTO)
- **Contact:** support@hermesworkspace.com
